message: Jake
Eva
A woman's voice
Hah
Hey, honey
What?
Hah
Hey, darling
I barged in because you didn't come to see me. Hehe.
Eh?
Hehehe, long time no see!
Look
Talk
Listen
System
The surroundings
About the article
About Guy
Save
Exit the game
In the bustling streets, with all the signs in kanji, it’s a Chinatown full of exotic atmosphere.
If it weren't for her struggling
presence right in front of me, I might feel like I'm in Shanghai.
She’s still glaring at me with those sharp, upward-looking eyes. No,
for her, this might be normal.
Still, she really does have a reptilian vibe; she must hit it off with Tony Ford.
Oh, you’re making a scary face. I'm not a fan of getting punched, so I'll take my leave. I'll drop by again soon.
Mwah!
She said whatever she wanted and left quickly as usual.
She was talking about my past being intriguing, but does she really intend to write an article?
I headed to the office feeling a twinge of unease.
Oh, by the way, I heard Kristy is seeing a psychiatrist.
That doesn't concern you, does it?
Going crazy over being dumped by Guy, huh? Guy really is a sinful man.
What I do is my business, you know. Hehe.
By the way, your office is around here, right?
So what?
Oh my, you're cold. If you treat me like that, it can be scary.
I'd rather avoid the scary part.
Hehe, I hope you're looking forward to the next article.
Is the next article also about Guy?
Sorry, wrong answer. The next target is Cindy.
Cindy?
That's right, it's a love story between Cindy and the detective.
A love story between Cindy and the detective, huh?
Of course, it's about you and Cindy. Cindy's really changing partners one after another, isn't she? It's quite something.
I wonder why you would try to write nonsense?
It's not nonsense. I saw with my own eyes Cindy go into your office. Hehehe.
It's a shame you liked younger ones, but since it could be useful for an article, I'll let it slide.
Is something wrong with Guy?
Stop playing dumb. You know where Guy went, right?
I know about Guy, but...
I'm not telling!
I won't tell you!
You should gather information on your own. It's too convenient to treat me like this and then ask for help now, isn't it?
Please don't say that, just give me your contact details.
No way.
Besides, I think you should worry about yourself more than others. I'm serious about writing this article.
Why me?
Because your past is really fascinating. You went from inheriting your grandfather's fortune to getting hooked on drugs and dropping out.
But, thanks to a woman's death, I've recovered and now live a carefree life without any inconveniences.
That's a very appealing material.
As for Guy's whereabouts, those who need to know are aware, and that's fine.
※※※ This is a bug ※※※
